response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior software developer with strong full-stack and DLang background, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5+ years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems on a cloud compute platform. The resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ components at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated production cloud compute platform or formal tech-lead experience at the required scale. Skills listed do not include C++ at all.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Strong testing/TDD culture and demonstrated mentoring via workshops, courses, and talks
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014–2015
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required seniority

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Mentoring, teaching, and TDD track record
